skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI-powered video creation agent that produces short videos (5-120 seconds) for social media, marketing, and content creation.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Legitimate video creation API client skill. All detected patterns are expected for an API wrapper: external commands execute curl/jq for HTTP requests, network access connects to pexo.ai API, filesystem access manages config in ~/.pexo/config and temp files, environment variables store API credentials. Shell scripts use command substitution but with hardcoded arguments - no user input injection vectors found. The 'weak cryptography' findings are MD5 usage in a troubleshooting diagnostic script, which is acceptable for non-security checksums. No malicious intent detected.

medium_findings.title: API Key Storage in Config File
medium_findings.description: The skill stores API keys in ~/.pexo/config file. This is a standard practice for CLI tools but users should be aware this file contains sensitive credentials and should be protected with appropriate file permissions.

low_findings.title: MD5 Hash in Troubleshooting Script
low_findings.description: The pexo-doctor.sh script uses MD5 for file verification. MD5 is cryptographically weak but acceptable for non-security diagnostic checksums to detect file corruption.

low_findings.title: Shell Command Substitution
low_findings.description: Scripts use command substitution ($()) extensively to execute curl, jq, and other utilities. All reviewed instances use hardcoded or internally-controlled variables with no user input injection vectors.

low_findings.title: Temporary File Creation
low_findings.description: Scripts create temporary files in ~/.pexo/tmp for storing HTTP headers and responses. This is standard practice for HTTP operations and files are cleaned up appropriately.

content.user_title: Create AI Videos with Claude Code
content.value_statement: Create professional short videos (5-120 seconds) for social media, marketing, and content without leaving Claude Code. The skill handles scriptwriting, visual production, and rendering automatically.
actual_capabilities: Create short videos (5-120 seconds) in multiple aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1)
Upload images, videos, and audio files to use as source material
Handle conversational video production with clarification and preview options
Poll for video completion and deliver final downloads with full URLs
Revise existing videos within the same project context
Support multiple languages in user requests
limitations: Requires a Pexo API key from pexo.ai
Video production takes 15-20 minutes for typical short videos
Cannot directly access web URLs - files must be downloaded first
Each message to Pexo consumes API tokens

use_cases.title: Product Marketing Videos
use_cases.description: Create promotional product videos for e-commerce. Upload product images and generate engaging short-form ads for TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing professionals and small business owners

use_cases.title: Social Media Content
use_cases.description: Generate branded social content quickly. Produce multiple video variations for different platforms with aspect ratios optimized for each destination.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content creators

use_cases.title: Explainer Videos
use_cases.description: Turn concepts into visual explainers. Describe your topic and receive a professional short video with script, visuals, and transitions.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Product Video
prompt_templates.prompt: I want to create a product video for my [product name]. Here are some product photos: [upload images]. Make it a 15-second promotional video for Instagram.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner creating their first video with existing product images

prompt_templates.title: Generate Social Content
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a TikTok video about [topic]. Target audience is [demographic]. Style should be [vibrant/professional/fun].
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate user specifying audience and style preferences

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Aspect-Ratio Production
prompt_templates.prompt: I need versions of this video in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, and 1:1 for Instagram. Create all three from these source materials: [upload files].
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced user producing for multiple platforms simultaneously

prompt_templates.title: Iterative Video Refinement
prompt_templates.prompt: The video draft is good but I want to change the music to something more energetic and make the transitions faster. Also adjust the color grading to be warmer.
prompt_templates.scenario: Experienced user providing specific revision feedback

output_examples.input: Create a 30-second product video for my coffee brand. Here's the product photo.
output_examples.output:
Project created: proj_abc123
File uploaded successfully: asset_xyz789
Request submitted to Pexo. Estimated time: 15-20 minutes.
Project link: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_abc123

[After 15 minutes of polling]
Your video is ready!
Download: https://pexo-assets.oss-us-east-1.aliyuncs.com/projects/proj_abc123/assets/video.mp4?Expires=123&Signature=abc
Project: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_abc123

Are you satisfied or would you like revisions?

output_examples.input: Make a TikTok video about sustainable fashion tips
output_examples.output:
Project created: proj_def456
Request submitted to Pexo. Estimated time: 15-20 minutes.
Project link: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_def456

[After polling]
Pexo is asking: What style do you prefer - minimalist aesthetic or bold and colorful?

[User responds: Bold and colorful]
Request submitted. Continuing to poll...

[After completion]
Your video is ready!
Download: https://pexo-assets.oss-us-east-1.aliyuncs.com/projects/proj_def456/assets/video.mp4?Expires=456&Signature=def

best_practices: Provide detailed creative direction in your initial request rather than multiple iterations to save time and API tokens
Upload high-quality source materials (images, videos, audio) at the start for better results
Check the project link at https://pexo.ai/project/{project_id} to monitor progress visually
Consolidate feedback into single messages rather than sending multiple small revisions
Save project IDs for future revisions on the same video concept
anti_patterns: Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or style parameters that the user did not explicitly request - let Pexo ask for these details
Do not send messages to pexo-chat.sh while nextAction is WAIT - this triggers duplicate video production
Do not truncate video URLs when delivering to users - the query parameters contain authentication tokens
Do not poll more frequently than every 60 seconds - this wastes API tokens and may hit rate limits
Do not switch languages when responding - always reply in the same language the user used

faq.question: How long does video creation take?
faq.answer: Most short videos (5-15 seconds) take 15-20 minutes. Longer or more complex videos up to 120 seconds may take 30 minutes or more. You can monitor progress at the project link.

faq.question: What file formats can I upload?
faq.answer: Images: jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic. Videos: mp4, mov, avi. Audio: mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac. Maximum file size is 200MB per asset.

faq.question: Can I revise a video after it is created?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the same project_id and send your feedback to pexo-chat.sh. The skill will request revisions and you can continue iterating until satisfied.

faq.question: Where are my API credentials stored?
faq.answer: Your Pexo API key and base URL are stored in ~/.pexo/config. Keep this file secure and do not share it. The skill requires PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL to be set.

faq.question: What happens if video creation fails?
faq.answer: The skill will provide an error message with nextActionHint explaining what went wrong. Check the project link and help guide at https://pexo.ai/connect/openclaw. You can retry or contact support.

faq.question: Can I create videos in languages other than English?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill supports multiple languages. Pexo will respond in the same language you use. Send your request in your preferred language and the skill will communicate in that language throughout.
